tEn: Enriching Word Vectors with Subword Information
tZh: 利用子词信息丰富词向量
sEn: We propose a fast skipgram-based method that represents words as bags of character n-grams, achieving state-of-the-art performance on word similarity and analogy tasks across nine languages.
sZh: 我们提出一种基于skipgram的快速方法，将单词表示为字符n-gram的集合，在九种语言的词相似性和类比任务上达到了最先进水平。
absEn: Continuous word representations, trained on large unlabeled corpora are useful for many natural language processing tasks. Popular models that learn such representations ignore the morphology of words, by assigning a distinct vector to each word. This is a limitation, especially for languages with large vocabularies and many rare words. In this paper, we propose a new approach based on the skipgram model, where each word is represented as a bag of character $n$-grams. A vector representation is associated to each character $n$-gram; words being represented as the sum of these representations. Our method is fast, allowing to train models on large corpora quickly and allows us to compute word representations for words that did not appear in the training data. We evaluate our word representations on nine different languages, both on word similarity and analogy tasks. By comparing to recently proposed morphological word representations, we show that our vectors achieve state-of-the-art performance on these tasks.
absZh: 在大规模无标签语料上训练的连续词表示对许多自然语言处理任务非常有用。学习这种表示的流行模型忽略了单词的形态，为每个单词分配一个不同的向量。这是一个局限，尤其对于词汇量大且罕见词多的语言。本文提出了一种基于skipgram模型的新方法，其中每个单词被表示为字符n-gram的集合。每个字符n-gram关联一个向量表示；单词表示为这些表示的总和。我们的方法速度快，允许快速在大语料上训练模型，并允许我们计算未出现在训练数据中的单词的词表示。我们在九种不同语言上评估了我们的词表示，包括词相似性和类比任务。通过与最近提出的形态词表示进行比较，我们展示了我们的向量在这些任务上达到了最先进的性能。

contrib.en: Proposes a skipgram extension using character n-grams to capture subword information.
contrib.zh: 提出一种基于字符n-gram的skipgram扩展，以捕捉子词信息。

contrib.en: Represents each word as a sum of its character n-gram vectors, enabling parameter sharing.
contrib.zh: 将每个词表示为其字符n-gram向量的和，实现参数共享。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on word similarity and analogy tasks across nine languages.
contrib.zh: 在九种语言的词相似性和类比任务上达到最先进性能。

contrib.en: Handles out-of-vocabulary words by composing vectors from their character n-grams.
contrib.zh: 通过组合字符n-gram向量处理词汇表外单词。

contrib.en: Demonstrates robustness to small training data, outperforming baselines with limited corpora.
contrib.zh: 对小训练数据具有鲁棒性，在有限语料上优于基线模型。

contrib.en: Improves language modeling perplexity, especially for morphologically rich languages.
contrib.zh: 改善语言建模困惑度，尤其对形态丰富的语言效果显著。

limits.en: Performance on semantic analogy tasks may degrade for some languages with suboptimal n-gram lengths.
limits.zh: 在语义类比任务上，若n-gram长度选择不当，某些语言性能可能下降。

limits.en: Model relies on a fixed range of n-gram lengths (3-6), which may not be optimal for all languages.
limits.zh: 模型依赖固定的n-gram长度范围（3-6），可能并非所有语言的最优选择。

limits.en: Training is approximately 1.5x slower than the skipgram baseline due to n-gram processing.
limits.zh: 由于n-gram处理，训练速度比skipgram基线慢约1.5倍。

limits.en: Evaluation on word similarity datasets may include out-of-vocabulary words, requiring null vectors for baselines.
limits.zh: 词相似性数据集可能包含词汇表外单词，基线模型需使用零向量。

limits.en: Method does not use morphological segmentation, potentially missing some linguistic structures.
limits.zh: 方法未使用形态分割，可能遗漏某些语言结构。

items.en: Continuous word representations, trained on large unlabeled corpora are useful for many natural language processing tasks. Popular models that learn such representations ignore the morphology of words, by assigning a distinct vector to each word. This is a limitation, especially for languages with large vocabularies and many rare words. In this paper, we propose a new approach based on the skipgram model, where each word is represented as a bag of character n𝑛n-grams. A vector representation is associated to each character n𝑛n-gram; words being represented as the sum of these representations. Our method is fast, allowing to train models on large corpora quickly and allows us to compute word representations for words that did not appear in the training data. We evaluate our word representations on nine different languages, both on word similarity and analogy tasks. By comparing to recently proposed morphological word representations, we show that our vectors achieve state-of-the-art performance on these tasks.
items.zh: 在大规模未标注语料上训练的连续词表示对许多自然语言处理任务很有用。学习这种表示的流行模型忽略了词的形态，为每个词分配一个不同的向量。这是一个局限，尤其是对于词汇量大且罕见词多的语言。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于skipgram模型的新方法，其中每个词被表示为一个字符n-gram的包。每个字符n-gram关联一个向量表示；词表示为这些表示的和。我们的方法速度快，允许在大型语料库上快速训练模型，并允许我们计算未出现在训练数据中的词的词表示。我们在九种不同语言上评估了我们的词表示，包括词相似性和类比任务。通过与最近提出的形态词表示进行比较，我们展示了我们的向量在这些任务上达到了最先进的性能。

items.en: Learning continuous representations of words has a long history in natural language processing [Rumelhart et al. (1988]. These representations are typically derived from large unlabeled corpora using co-occurrence statistics [Deerwester et al. (1990, Schütze (1992, Lund and Burgess (1996]. A large body of work, known as distributional semantics, has studied the properties of these methods [Turney et al. (2010, Baroni and Lenci (2010]. In the neural network community, ?) proposed to learn word embeddings using a feedforward neural network, by predicting a word based on the two words on the left and two words on the right. More recently, ?) proposed simple log-bilinear models to learn continuous representations of words on very large corpora efficiently.
items.zh: 学习词的连续表示在自然语言处理中有着悠久的历史[Rumelhart et al. (1988)]。这些表示通常使用共现统计从大规模未标注语料库中推导出来[Deerwester et al. (1990), Schütze (1992), Lund and Burgess (1996)]。大量被称为分布语义学的工作研究了这些方法的性质[Turney et al. (2010), Baroni and Lenci (2010)]。在神经网络社区中，?) 提出使用前馈神经网络学习词嵌入，通过基于左边两个词和右边两个词预测一个词。最近，?) 提出了简单的log-bilinear模型，以高效地在非常大的语料库上学习词的连续表示。

items.en: Most of these techniques represent each word of the vocabulary by a distinct vector, without parameter sharing. In particular, they ignore the internal structure of words, which is an important limitation for morphologically rich languages, such as Turkish or Finnish. For example, in French or Spanish, most verbs have more than forty different inflected forms, while the Finnish language has fifteen cases for nouns. These languages contain many word forms that occur rarely (or not at all) in the training corpus, making it difficult to learn good word representations. Because many word formations follow rules, it is possible to improve vector representations for morphologically rich languages by using character level information.
items.zh: 大多数这些技术通过不同的向量表示词汇表中的每个词，没有参数共享。特别是，它们忽略了词的内部结构，这对于形态丰富的语言（如土耳其语或芬兰语）是一个重要的局限。例如，在法语或西班牙语中，大多数动词有超过四十种不同的屈折形式，而芬兰语名词有十五个格。这些语言包含许多在训练语料中很少出现（或根本不出现）的词形，使得学习好的词表示变得困难。由于许多词形遵循规则，通过使用字符级信息可以改进形态丰富语言的向量表示。

items.en: In this paper, we propose to learn representations for character n𝑛n-grams, and to represent words as the sum of the n𝑛n-gram vectors. Our main contribution is to introduce an extension of the continuous skipgram model [Mikolov et al. (2013b], which takes into account subword information. We evaluate this model on nine languages exhibiting different morphologies, showing the benefit of our approach.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出学习字符n-gram的表示，并将词表示为n-gram向量的和。我们的主要贡献是引入了连续skipgram模型[Mikolov et al. (2013b)]的扩展，该扩展考虑了子词信息。我们在九种具有不同形态的语言上评估了这个模型，展示了我们方法的好处。

items.en: In recent years, many methods have been proposed to incorporate morphological information into word representations. To model rare words better, ?) introduced factored neural language models, where words are represented as sets of features. These features might include morphological information, and this technique was succesfully applied to morphologically rich languages, such as Turkish [Sak et al. (2010]. Recently, several works have proposed different composition functions to derive representations of words from morphemes [Lazaridou et al. (2013, Luong et al. (2013, Botha and Blunsom (2014, Qiu et al. (2014]. These different approaches rely on a morphological decomposition of words, while ours does not. Similarly, ?) introduced a method to jointly learn embeddings for Chinese words and characters. ?) proposed to constrain morphologically similar words to have similar representations. ?) described a method to learn vector representations of morphological transformations, allowing to obtain representations for unseen words by applying these rules. Word representations trained on morphologically annotated data were introduced by ?). Closest to our approach, ?) learned representations of character four-grams through singular value decomposition, and derived representations for words by summing the four-grams representations. Very recently, ?) also proposed to represent words using character n𝑛n-gram count vectors. However, the objective function used to learn these representations is based on paraphrase pairs, while our model can be trained on any text corpus.
items.zh: 近年来，许多方法被提出来将形态信息融入词表示中。为了更好地建模罕见词，?) 引入了因子化神经语言模型，其中词被表示为特征集。这些特征可能包括形态信息，并且该技术已成功应用于形态丰富的语言，如土耳其语[Sak et al. (2010)]。最近，几项工作提出了不同的组合函数，从语素中推导词的表示[Lazaridou et al. (2013), Luong et al. (2013), Botha and Blunsom (2014), Qiu et al. (2014)]。这些不同的方法依赖于词的形态分解，而我们的方法则不依赖。类似地，?) 引入了一种联合学习中文词和字符嵌入的方法。?) 提出约束形态相似的词具有相似的表示。?) 描述了一种学习形态变换向量表示的方法，允许通过应用这些规则获得未见词的表示。在形态标注数据上训练的词表示由?) 引入。与我们的方法最接近的是，?) 通过奇异值分解学习了字符四元组的表示，并通过求和四元组表示推导出词的表示。最近，?) 也提出使用字符n-gram计数向量来表示词。然而，用于学习这些表示的目标函数基于释义对，而我们的模型可以在任何文本语料库上训练。

items.en: Another area of research closely related to our work are character-level models for natural language processing. These models discard the segmentation into words and aim at learning language representations directly from characters. A first class of such models are recurrent neural networks, applied to language modeling [Mikolov et al. (2012, Sutskever et al. (2011, Graves (2013, Bojanowski et al. (2015], text normalization [Chrupała (2014], part-of-speech tagging [Ling et al. (2015] and parsing [Ballesteros et al. (2015]. Another family of models are convolutional neural networks trained on characters, which were applied to part-of-speech tagging [dos Santos and Zadrozny (2014], sentiment analysis [dos Santos and Gatti (2014], text classification [Zhang et al. (2015] and language modeling [Kim et al. (2016]. ?) introduced a language model based on restricted Boltzmann machines, in which words are encoded as a set of character n𝑛n-grams. Finally, recent works in machine translation have proposed using subword units to obtain representations of rare words [Sennrich et al. (2016, Luong and Manning (2016].
items.zh: 与我们的工作密切相关的另一个研究领域是自然语言处理的字符级模型。这些模型丢弃了词的分割，旨在直接从字符学习语言表示。第一类这样的模型是循环神经网络，应用于语言建模[Mikolov et al. (2012), Sutskever et al. (2011), Graves (2013), Bojanowski et al. (2015)]、文本规范化[Chrupała (2014)]、词性标注[Ling et al. (2015)]和句法分析[Ballesteros et al. (2015)]。另一类模型是在字符上训练的卷积神经网络，应用于词性标注[dos Santos and Zadrozny (2014)]、情感分析[dos Santos and Gatti (2014)]、文本分类[Zhang et al. (2015)]和语言建模[Kim et al. (2016)]。?) 引入了一种基于受限玻尔兹曼机的语言模型，其中词被编码为一组字符n-gram。最后，机器翻译中的近期工作提出使用子词单元来获得罕见词的表示[Sennrich et al. (2016), Luong and Manning (2016)]。

items.en: In this section, we propose our model to learn word representations while taking into account morphology. We model morphology by considering subword units, and representing words by a sum of its character n𝑛n-grams. We will begin by presenting the general framework that we use to train word vectors, then present our subword model and eventually describe how we handle the dictionary of character n𝑛n-grams.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们提出我们的模型来学习词表示，同时考虑形态。我们通过考虑子词单元来建模形态，并将词表示为其字符n-gram的和。我们将首先介绍用于训练词向量的通用框架，然后介绍我们的子词模型，最后描述我们如何处理字符n-gram的字典。

items.en: We start by briefly reviewing the continuous skipgram model introduced by ?), from which our model is derived. Given a word vocabulary of size W𝑊W, where a word is identified by its index w∈{1,…,W}𝑤1…𝑊w~{}\in~{}\{1,...,W\}, the goal is to learn a vectorial representation for each word w𝑤w. Inspired by the distributional hypothesis [Harris (1954], word representations are trained to predict well words that appear in its context. More formally, given a large training corpus represented as a sequence of words w1,…,wTsubscript𝑤1…subscript𝑤𝑇w_{1},...,w_{T}, the objective of the skipgram model is to maximize the following log-likelihood:
items.zh: 我们首先简要回顾由?) 引入的连续skipgram模型，我们的模型源于此。给定大小为W的词表，其中词由其索引w∈{1,…,W}标识，目标是学习每个词w的向量表示。受分布假设[Harris (1954)]的启发，词表示被训练以很好地预测出现在其上下文中的词。更正式地，给定一个表示为词序列w1,…,wT的大型训练语料库，skipgram模型的目标是最大化以下对数似然：

items.en: where the context 𝒞tsubscript𝒞𝑡\mathcal{C}_{t} is the set of indices of words surrounding word wtsubscript𝑤𝑡w_{t}. The probability of observing a context word wcsubscript𝑤𝑐w_{c} given wtsubscript𝑤𝑡w_{t} will be parameterized using the aforementioned word vectors. For now, let us consider that we are given a scoring function s𝑠s which maps pairs of (word, context) to scores in ℝℝ\mathbb{R}. One possible choice to define the probability of a context word is the softmax:
items.zh: 其中上下文Ct是围绕词wt的词索引集。给定wt观察到上下文词wc的概率将使用上述词向量进行参数化。现在，让我们考虑我们有一个评分函数s，它将（词，上下文）对映射到ℝ中的分数。定义上下文词概率的一个可能选择是softmax：

items.en: However, such a model is not adapted to our case as it implies that, given a word wtsubscript𝑤𝑡w_{t}, we only predict one context word wcsubscript𝑤𝑐w_{c}.
items.zh: 然而，这样的模型不适合我们的情况，因为它意味着给定一个词wt，我们只预测一个上下文词wc。

items.en: The problem of predicting context words can instead be framed as a set of independent binary classification tasks. Then the goal is to independently predict the presence (or absence) of context words. For the word at position t𝑡t we consider all context words as positive examples and sample negatives at random from the dictionary. For a chosen context position c𝑐c, using the binary logistic loss, we obtain the following negative log-likelihood:
items.zh: 预测上下文词的问题可以改为一组独立的二元分类任务。然后目标是独立预测上下文词的存在（或缺失）。对于位置t处的词，我们将所有上下文词视为正例，并从字典中随机采样负例。对于选定的上下文位置c，使用二元逻辑损失，我们得到以下负对数似然：

items.en: where 𝒩t,csubscript𝒩𝑡𝑐\mathcal{N}_{t,c} is a set of negative examples sampled from the vocabulary. By denoting the logistic loss function ℓ:x↦log⁡(1+e−x):ℓmaps-to𝑥1superscript𝑒𝑥\ell:x\mapsto\log(1+e^{-x}), we can re-write the objective as:
items.zh: 其中Nt,c是从词汇表中采样的负例集。通过将逻辑损失函数记为ℓ:x↦log(1+e−x)，我们可以将目标重写为：

items.en: A natural parameterization for the scoring function s𝑠s between a word wtsubscript𝑤𝑡w_{t} and a context word wcsubscript𝑤𝑐w_{c} is to use word vectors. Let us define for each word w𝑤w in the vocabulary two vectors uwsubscript𝑢𝑤u_{w} and vwsubscript𝑣𝑤v_{w} in ℝdsuperscriptℝ𝑑\mathbb{R}^{d}. These two vectors are sometimes referred to as input and output vectors in the literature. In particular, we have vectors 𝐮wtsubscript𝐮subscript𝑤𝑡\mathbf{u}_{w_{t}} and 𝐯wcsubscript𝐯subscript𝑤𝑐\mathbf{v}_{w_{c}}, corresponding, respectively, to words wtsubscript𝑤𝑡w_{t} and wcsubscript𝑤𝑐w_{c}. Then the score can be computed as the scalar product between word and context vectors as s​(wt,wc)=𝐮wt⊤​𝐯wc𝑠subscript𝑤𝑡subscript𝑤𝑐superscriptsubscript𝐮subscript𝑤𝑡topsubscript𝐯subscript𝑤𝑐s(w_{t},w_{c})=\mathbf{u}_{w_{t}}^{\top}\mathbf{v}_{w_{c}}. The model described in this section is the skipgram model with negative sampling, introduced by ?).
items.zh: 词wt和上下文词wc之间的评分函数s的自然参数化是使用词向量。让我们为词汇表中的每个词w定义两个向量uw和vw，均在ℝd中。这两个向量在文献中有时被称为输入和输出向量。特别地，我们有向量uwt和vwc，分别对应于词wt和wc。然后分数可以计算为词向量和上下文向量之间的标量积：s(wt,wc)=uwt⊤vwc。本节描述的模型是带有负采样的skipgram模型，由?) 引入。

items.en: By using a distinct vector representation for each word, the skipgram model ignores the internal structure of words. In this section, we propose a different scoring function s𝑠s, in order to take into account this information.
items.zh: 通过为每个词使用不同的向量表示，skipgram模型忽略了词的内部结构。在本节中，我们提出一个不同的评分函数s，以考虑这些信息。

items.en: Each word w𝑤w is represented as a bag of character n𝑛n-gram. We add special boundary symbols < and > at the beginning and end of words, allowing to distinguish prefixes and suffixes from other character sequences. We also include the word w𝑤w itself in the set of its n𝑛n-grams, to learn a representation for each word (in addition to character n𝑛n-grams). Taking the word where and n=3𝑛3n=3 as an example, it will be represented by the character n𝑛n-grams:
items.zh: 每个词w被表示为一个字符n-gram的包。我们在词的开头和结尾添加特殊边界符号<和>，以便将前缀和后缀与其他字符序列区分开来。我们还将词w本身包含在其n-gram集合中，以学习每个词的表示（除了字符n-gram）。以词where和n=3为例，它将由以下字符n-gram表示：

items.en: Note that the sequence <her>, corresponding to the word her is different from the tri-gram her from the word where. In practice, we extract all the n𝑛n-grams for n𝑛n greater or equal to 3 and smaller or equal to 666. This is a very simple approach, and different sets of n𝑛n-grams could be considered, for example taking all prefixes and suffixes.
items.zh: 注意，序列<her>（对应于词her）与来自词where的三元组her不同。在实践中，我们提取所有n大于等于3且小于等于6的n-gram。这是一种非常简单的方法，可以考虑不同的n-gram集合，例如取所有前缀和后缀。

items.en: Suppose that you are given a dictionary of n𝑛n-grams of size G𝐺G. Given a word w𝑤w, let us denote by 𝒢w⊂{1,…,G}subscript𝒢𝑤1…𝐺\mathcal{G}_{w}\subset\{1,\dots,G\} the set of n𝑛n-grams appearing in w𝑤w. We associate a vector representation 𝐳gsubscript𝐳𝑔\mathbf{z}_{g} to each n𝑛n-gram g𝑔g. We represent a word by the sum of the vector representations of its n𝑛n-grams. We thus obtain the scoring function:
items.zh: 假设你有一个大小为G的n-gram字典。给定一个词w，让我们用Gw⊂{1,…,G}表示出现在w中的n-gram集合。我们为每个n-gram g关联一个向量表示zg。我们通过其n-gram的向量表示的和来表示一个词。因此我们得到评分函数：

items.en: This simple model allows sharing the representations across words, thus allowing to learn reliable representation for rare words.
items.zh: 这个简单的模型允许跨词共享表示，从而允许学习罕见词的可靠表示。

items.en: In order to bound the memory requirements of our model, we use a hashing function that maps n𝑛n-grams to integers in 1 to K𝐾K. We hash character sequences using the Fowler-Noll-Vo hashing function (specifically the FNV-1a variant).111http://www.isthe.com/chongo/tech/comp/fnv We set K=2.106𝐾superscript2.106K=2.10^{6} below. Ultimately, a word is represented by its index in the word dictionary and the set of hashed n𝑛n-grams it contains.
items.zh: 为了限制模型的内存需求，我们使用一个哈希函数将n-gram映射到1到K之间的整数。我们使用Fowler-Noll-Vo哈希函数（特别是FNV-1a变体）对字符序列进行哈希。我们在下面设置K=2.10^6。最终，一个词由其词字典中的索引及其包含的哈希n-gram集合表示。

items.en: In most experiments (except in Sec. 5.3), we compare our model to the C implementation of the skipgram and cbow models from the word2vec222https://code.google.com/archive/p/word2vec package.
items.zh: 在大多数实验中（除第5.3节外），我们将我们的模型与word2vec包中skipgram和cbow模型的C实现进行比较。

items.en: We solve our optimization problem by performing stochastic gradient descent on the negative log likelihood presented before. As in the baseline skipgram model, we use a linear decay of the step size. Given a training set containing T𝑇T words and a number of passes over the data equal to P𝑃P, the step size at time t𝑡t is equal to γ0​(1−tT​P)subscript𝛾01𝑡𝑇𝑃\gamma_{0}(1-\frac{t}{TP}), where γ0subscript𝛾0\gamma_{0} is a fixed parameter. We carry out the optimization in parallel, by resorting to Hogwild [Recht et al. (2011]. All threads share parameters and update vectors in an asynchronous manner.
items.zh: 我们通过对之前提出的负对数似然执行随机梯度下降来求解优化问题。与基线skipgram模型一样，我们使用步长的线性衰减。给定包含T个单词的训练集和P次数据遍历，时间t处的步长等于γ0(1 - t/(TP))，其中γ0是固定参数。我们通过采用Hogwild [Recht et al. (2011)] 并行执行优化。所有线程共享参数并以异步方式更新向量。

items.en: For both our model and the baseline experiments, we use the following parameters: the word vectors have dimension 300300300. For each positive example, we sample 555 negatives at random, with probability proportional to the square root of the uni-gram frequency. We use a context window of size c𝑐c, and uniformly sample the size c𝑐c between 111 and 555. In order to subsample the most frequent words, we use a rejection threshold of 10−4superscript10410^{-4} (for more details, see [Mikolov et al. (2013b]). When building the word dictionary, we keep the words that appear at least 555 times in the training set. The step size γ0subscript𝛾0\gamma_{0} is set to 0.0250.0250.025 for the skipgram baseline and to 0.050.050.05 for both our model and the cbow baseline. These are the default values in the word2vec package and work well for our model too.
items.zh: 对于我们的模型和基线实验，我们使用以下参数：词向量维度为300。对于每个正例，我们随机采样5个负例，概率与unigram频率的平方根成正比。我们使用大小为c的上下文窗口，并在1到5之间均匀采样c的大小。为了对最频繁的词进行子采样，我们使用拒绝阈值10^{-4}（更多细节见[Mikolov et al. (2013b)]）。构建词典时，我们保留训练集中出现至少5次的词。skipgram基线的步长γ0设为0.025，我们的模型和cbow基线设为0.05。这些是word2vec包中的默认值，对我们的模型也适用。

items.en: Using this setting on English data, our model with character n𝑛n-grams is approximately 1.5×1.5\times slower to train than the skipgram baseline. Indeed, we process 105105105k words/second/thread versus 145145145k words/second/thread for the baseline. Our model is implemented in C++, and is publicly available.333https://github.com/facebookresearch/fastText
items.zh: 在英语数据上使用此设置，我们的带有字符n-gram的模型训练速度比skipgram基线慢约1.5倍。实际上，我们处理105k词/秒/线程，而基线为145k词/秒/线程。我们的模型用C++实现，并公开可用。

items.en: Except for the comparison to previous work (Sec. 5.3), we train our models on Wikipedia data.444https://dumps.wikimedia.org We downloaded Wikipedia dumps in nine languages: Arabic, Czech, German, English, Spanish, French, Italian, Romanian and Russian. We normalize the raw Wikipedia data using Matt Mahoney’s pre-processing perl script.555http://mattmahoney.net/dc/textdata All the datasets are shuffled, and we train our models by doing five passes over them.
items.zh: 除了与先前工作的比较（第5.3节），我们在维基百科数据上训练模型。我们下载了九种语言的维基百科转储：阿拉伯语、捷克语、德语、英语、西班牙语、法语、意大利语、罗马尼亚语和俄语。我们使用Matt Mahoney的预处理perl脚本对原始维基百科数据进行归一化。所有数据集都被打乱，我们通过五次遍历来训练模型。

items.en: We evaluate our model in five experiments: an evaluation of word similarity and word analogies, a comparison to state-of-the-art methods, an analysis of the effect of the size of training data and of the size of character n𝑛n-grams that we consider. We will describe these experiments in detail in the following sections.
items.zh: 我们在五个实验中评估模型：词相似性和词类比评估、与最先进方法的比较、训练数据大小的影响分析以及字符n-gram大小的影响分析。我们将在以下章节中详细描述这些实验。

items.en: We first evaluate the quality of our representations on the task of word similarity / relatedness. We do so by computing Spearman’s rank correlation coefficient [Spearman (1904] between human judgement and the cosine similarity between the vector representations. For German, we compare the different models on three datasets: Gur65, Gur350 and ZG222 [Gurevych (2005, Zesch and Gurevych (2006]. For English, we use the WS353 dataset introduced by ?) and the rare word dataset (RW), introduced by ?). We evaluate the French word vectors on the translated dataset RG65 [Joubarne and Inkpen (2011]. Spanish, Arabic and Romanian word vectors are evaluated using the datasets described in [Hassan and Mihalcea (2009]. Russian word vectors are evaluated using the HJ dataset introduced by ?).
items.zh: 我们首先在词相似性/相关性任务上评估表示的质量。我们通过计算人类判断与向量表示之间余弦相似度的斯皮尔曼秩相关系数[Spearman (1904)]来实现。对于德语，我们在三个数据集上比较不同模型：Gur65、Gur350和ZG222 [Gurevych (2005), Zesch and Gurevych (2006)]。对于英语，我们使用?)引入的WS353数据集和?)引入的稀有词数据集(RW)。我们在翻译后的数据集RG65 [Joubarne and Inkpen (2011)]上评估法语词向量。西班牙语、阿拉伯语和罗马尼亚语词向量使用[Hassan and Mihalcea (2009)]中描述的数据集进行评估。俄语词向量使用?)引入的HJ数据集进行评估。

items.en: We report results for our method and baselines for all datasets in Table 1. Some words from these datasets do not appear in our training data, and thus, we cannot obtain word representation for these words using the cbow and skipgram baselines. In order to provide comparable results, we propose by default to use null vectors for these words. Since our model exploits subword information, we can also compute valid representations for out-of-vocabulary words. We do so by taking the sum of its n𝑛n-gram vectors. When OOV words are represented using null vectors we refer to our method as sisg- and sisg otherwise (Subword Information Skip Gram).
items.zh: 我们在表1中报告了我们的方法和基线在所有数据集上的结果。这些数据集中的一些词未出现在我们的训练数据中，因此我们无法使用cbow和skipgram基线获得这些词的表示。为了提供可比结果，我们默认对这些词使用零向量。由于我们的模型利用了子词信息，我们也可以为词汇表外的词计算有效表示。我们通过求和其n-gram向量来实现。当OOV词用零向量表示时，我们将我们的方法称为sisg-，否则称为sisg（子词信息跳元）。

items.en: First, by looking at Table 1, we notice that the proposed model (sisg), which uses subword information, outperforms the baselines on all datasets except the English WS353 dataset. Moreover, computing vectors for out-of-vocabulary words (sisg) is always at least as good as not doing so (sisg-). This proves the advantage of using subword information in the form of character n𝑛n-grams.
items.zh: 首先，通过查看表1，我们注意到提出的模型（sisg）使用子词信息，在所有数据集上优于基线，除了英语WS353数据集。此外，为词汇表外词计算向量（sisg）总是至少与不计算（sisg-）一样好。这证明了以字符n-gram形式使用子词信息的优势。

items.en: Second, we observe that the effect of using character n𝑛n-grams is more important for Arabic, German and Russian than for English, French or Spanish. German and Russian exhibit grammatical declensions with four cases for German and six for Russian. Also, many German words are compound words; for instance the nominal phrase “table tennis” is written in a single word as “Tischtennis”. By exploiting the character-level similarities between “Tischtennis” and “Tennis”, our model does not represent the two words as completely different words.
items.zh: 其次，我们观察到使用字符n-gram的效果对于阿拉伯语、德语和俄语比英语、法语或西班牙语更重要。德语和俄语表现出语法变格，德语有四个格，俄语有六个。此外，许多德语词是复合词；例如名词短语“table tennis”写成一个词“Tischtennis”。通过利用“Tischtennis”和“Tennis”之间的字符级相似性，我们的模型不会将这两个词表示为完全不同的词。

items.en: Finally, we observe that on the English Rare Words dataset (RW), our approach outperforms the baselines while it does not on the English WS353 dataset. This is due to the fact that words in the English WS353 dataset are common words for which good vectors can be obtained without exploiting subword information. When evaluating on less frequent words, we see that using similarities at the character level between words can help learning good word vectors.
items.zh: 最后，我们观察到在英语稀有词数据集（RW）上，我们的方法优于基线，而在英语WS353数据集上则不然。这是因为英语WS353数据集中的词是常见词，无需利用子词信息即可获得好的向量。当评估较不频繁的词时，我们看到利用词之间的字符级相似性有助于学习好的词向量。

items.en: We now evaluate our approach on word analogy questions, of the form A𝐴A is to B𝐵B as C𝐶C is to D𝐷D, where D𝐷D must be predicted by the models. We use the datasets introduced by ?) for English, by ?) for Czech, by ?) for German and by ?) for Italian. Some questions contain words that do not appear in our training corpus, and we thus excluded these questions from the evaluation.
items.zh: 我们现在在词类比问题上评估我们的方法，形式为A之于B如同C之于D，其中D必须由模型预测。我们使用?)为英语、?)为捷克语、?)为德语和?)为意大利语引入的数据集。一些问题包含未出现在我们训练语料中的词，因此我们从评估中排除了这些问题。

items.en: We report accuracy for the different models in Table 2. We observe that morphological information significantly improves the syntactic tasks; our approach outperforms the baselines. In contrast, it does not help for semantic questions, and even degrades the performance for German and Italian. Note that this is tightly related to the choice of the length of character n𝑛n-grams that we consider. We show in Sec. 5.5 that when the size of the n𝑛n-grams is chosen optimally, the semantic analogies degrade less. Another interesting observation is that, as expected, the improvement over the baselines is more important for morphologically rich languages, such as Czech and German.
items.zh: 我们在表2中报告了不同模型的准确率。我们观察到形态信息显著提高了句法任务；我们的方法优于基线。相比之下，它对语义问题没有帮助，甚至降低了德语和意大利语的性能。注意，这与我们选择的字符n-gram长度密切相关。我们在第5.5节中表明，当n-gram大小选择最优时，语义类比退化较少。另一个有趣的观察是，正如预期，对于形态丰富的语言（如捷克语和德语），相对于基线的改进更为重要。

items.en: We also compare our approach to previous work on word vectors incorporating subword information on word similarity tasks. The methods used are: the recursive neural network of ?), the morpheme cbow of ?) and the morphological transformations of ?). In order to make the results comparable, we trained our model on the same datasets as the methods we are comparing to: the English Wikipedia data released by ?), and the news crawl data from the 2013 WMT shared task for German, Spanish and French. We also compare our approach to the log-bilinear language model introduced by ?), which was trained on the Europarl and news commentary corpora. Again, we trained our model on the same data to make the results comparable. Using our model, we obtain representations of out-of-vocabulary words by summing the representations of character n𝑛n-grams. We report results in Table 3. We observe that our simple approach performs well relative to techniques based on subword information obtained from morphological segmentors. We also observe that our approach outperforms the ?) method, which is based on prefix and suffix analysis. The large improvement for German is due to the fact that their approach does not model noun compounding, contrary to ours.
items.zh: 我们还将我们的方法与先前在词相似性任务上结合子词信息的词向量工作进行比较。使用的方法包括：?)的递归神经网络、?)的morpheme cbow和?)的形态变换。为了使结果可比，我们在与比较方法相同的数据集上训练我们的模型：?)发布的英语维基百科数据，以及2013年WMT共享任务中德语、西班牙语和法语的新闻爬取数据。我们还将我们的方法与?)引入的对数双线性语言模型进行比较，该模型在Europarl和新闻评论语料上训练。同样，我们在相同数据上训练我们的模型以使结果可比。使用我们的模型，我们通过求和字符n-gram的表示来获得词汇表外词的表示。我们在表3中报告结果。我们观察到，我们的简单方法相对于基于形态分割器获得的子词信息的技术表现良好。我们还观察到，我们的方法优于?)的方法，该方法基于前缀和后缀分析。德语的大幅改进是因为他们的方法不像我们的方法那样建模名词复合。

full.sec: 5.4 Effect of the size of the training data

items.en: Since we exploit character-level similarities between words, we are able to better model infrequent words. Therefore, we should also be more robust to the size of the training data that we use. In order to assess that, we propose to evaluate the performance of our word vectors on the similarity task as a function of the training data size. To this end, we train our model and the cbow baseline on portions of Wikipedia of increasing size. We use the Wikipedia corpus described above and isolate the first 111, 222, 555, 101010, 202020, and 505050 percent of the data. Since we don’t reshuffle the dataset, they are all subsets of each other. We report results in Fig. 1.
items.zh: 由于我们利用了词之间的字符级相似性，我们能够更好地建模低频词。因此，我们应该对训练数据的大小更具鲁棒性。为了评估这一点，我们提出评估词向量在相似性任务上的性能作为训练数据大小的函数。为此，我们在维基百科的递增大小部分上训练我们的模型和cbow基线。我们使用上述维基百科语料，并分离出前1%、2%、5%、10%、20%和50%的数据。由于我们没有重新打乱数据集，它们都是彼此的子集。我们在图1中报告结果。

items.en: As in the experiment presented in Sec. 5.1, not all words from the evaluation set are present in the Wikipedia data. Again, by default, we use a null vector for these words (sisg-) or compute a vector by summing the n𝑛n-gram representations (sisg). The out-of-vocabulary rate is growing as the dataset shrinks, and therefore the performance of sisg- and cbow necessarily degrades. However, the proposed model (sisg) assigns non-trivial vectors to previously unseen words.
items.zh: 与第5.1节中的实验一样，评估集中的一些词未出现在维基百科数据中。同样，默认情况下，我们对这些词使用零向量（sisg-）或通过求和n-gram表示来计算向量（sisg）。随着数据集缩小，词汇表外率增加，因此sisg-和cbow的性能必然下降。然而，提出的模型（sisg）为未见过的词分配了非平凡向量。

items.en: First, we notice that for all datasets, and all sizes, the proposed approach (sisg) performs better than the baseline. However, the performance of the baseline cbow model gets better as more and more data is available. Our model, on the other hand, seems to quickly saturate and adding more data does not always lead to improved results.
items.zh: 首先，我们注意到对于所有数据集和所有大小，提出的方法（sisg）优于基线。然而，基线cbow模型的性能随着数据增多而变好。另一方面，我们的模型似乎很快饱和，添加更多数据并不总是导致结果改进。

items.en: Second, and most importantly, we notice that the proposed approach provides very good word vectors even when using very small training datasets. For instance, on the German Gur350 dataset, our model (sisg) trained on 5%percent55\% of the data achieves better performance (666666) than the cbow baseline trained on the full dataset (626262). On the other hand, on the English RW dataset, using 1%percent11\% of the Wikipedia corpus we achieve a correlation coefficient of 454545 which is better than the performance of cbow trained on the full dataset (434343). This has a very important practical implication: well performing word vectors can be computed on datasets of a restricted size and still work well on previously unseen words. In general, when using vectorial word representations in specific applications, it is recommended to retrain the model on textual data relevant for the application. However, this kind of relevant task-specific data is often very scarce and learning from a reduced amount of training data is a great advantage.
items.zh: 其次，最重要的是，我们注意到即使使用非常小的训练数据集，提出的方法也能提供非常好的词向量。例如，在德语Gur350数据集上，我们的模型（sisg）在5%的数据上训练达到的性能（66）优于在完整数据集上训练的cbow基线（62）。另一方面，在英语RW数据集上，使用1%的维基百科语料，我们达到的相关系数为45，优于在完整数据集上训练的cbow（43）。这具有非常重要的实际意义：可以在有限大小的数据集上计算性能良好的词向量，并且仍然对未见过的词有效。通常，在特定应用中使用向量化词表示时，建议在与应用相关的文本数据上重新训练模型。然而，这种相关的任务特定数据通常非常稀缺，从减少的训练数据量中学习是一个巨大的优势。

full.sec: 5.5 Effect of the size of n𝑛n-grams

items.en: The proposed model relies on the use of character n𝑛n-grams to represent words as vectors. As mentioned in Sec. 3.2, we decided to use n𝑛n-grams ranging from 333 to 666 characters. This choice was arbitrary, motivated by the fact that n𝑛n-grams of these lengths will cover a wide range of information. They would include short suffixes (corresponding to conjugations and declensions for instance) as well as longer roots. In this experiment, we empirically check for the influence of the range of n𝑛n-grams that we use on performance. We report our results in Table 4 for English and German on word similarity and analogy datasets.
items.zh: 提出的模型依赖于使用字符n-gram将词表示为向量。如第3.2节所述，我们决定使用从3到6个字符的n-gram。这个选择是任意的，动机是这些长度的n-gram将覆盖广泛的信息。它们将包括短后缀（例如对应变位和变格）以及更长的词根。在本实验中，我们经验性地检查使用的n-gram范围对性能的影响。我们在表4中报告英语和德语在词相似性和类比数据集上的结果。

items.en: We observe that for both English and German, our arbitrary choice of 333-666 was a reasonable decision, as it provides satisfactory performance across languages. The optimal choice of length ranges depends on the considered task and language and should be tuned appropriately. However, due to the scarcity of test data, we did not implement any proper validation procedure to automatically select the best parameters. Nonetheless, taking a large range such as 3−6363-6 provides a reasonable amount of subword information.
items.zh: 我们观察到，对于英语和德语，我们任意选择的 333-666 是一个合理的决定，因为它在不同语言中均提供了令人满意的性能。长度范围的最佳选择取决于所考虑的任务和语言，应适当调整。然而，由于测试数据稀缺，我们没有实施任何适当的验证程序来自动选择最佳参数。尽管如此，采用较大的范围（如 3−6363-6）能提供合理的子词信息量。

items.en: This experiment also shows that it is important to include long n𝑛n-grams, as columns corresponding to n≤5𝑛5n\leq 5 and n≤6𝑛6n\leq 6 work best. This is especially true for German, as many nouns are compounds made up from several units that can only be captured by longer character sequences. On analogy tasks, we observe that using larger n𝑛n-grams helps for semantic analogies. However, results are always improved by taking n≥3𝑛3n\geq 3 rather than n≥2𝑛2n\geq 2, which shows that character 222-grams are not informative for that task. As described in Sec. 3.2, before computing character n𝑛n-grams, we prepend and append special positional characters to represent the beginning and end of word. Therefore, 222-grams will not be enough to properly capture suffixes that correspond to conjugations or declensions, since they are composed of a single proper character and a positional one.
items.zh: 该实验还表明，包含长 n 元语法很重要，因为对应于 n≤5n\leq 5 和 n≤6n\leq 6 的列效果最佳。这对德语尤其如此，因为许多名词是由多个单元组成的复合词，只能通过较长的字符序列来捕获。在类比任务上，我们观察到使用更大的 n 元语法有助于语义类比。然而，采用 n≥3n\geq 3 的结果总是优于 n≥2n\geq 2，这表明字符 2 元语法对该任务没有信息量。如第 3.2 节所述，在计算字符 n 元语法之前，我们会添加特殊的位置字符来表示单词的开头和结尾。因此，2 元语法不足以正确捕获对应于变位或变格的词缀，因为它们由一个普通字符和一个位置字符组成。

items.en: In this section, we describe an evaluation of the word vectors obtained with our method on a language modeling task. We evaluate our language model on five languages (Cs, De, Es, Fr, Ru) using the datasets introduced by ?). Each dataset contains roughly one million training tokens, and we use the same preprocessing and data splits as ?).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述了在语言建模任务上对我们方法获得的词向量的评估。我们使用 ?) 引入的数据集，在五种语言（Cs、De、Es、Fr、Ru）上评估我们的语言模型。每个数据集包含大约一百万个训练词元，我们使用与 ?) 相同的预处理和数据划分。

items.en: Our model is a recurrent neural network with 650650650 LSTM units, regularized with dropout (with probability of 0.50.50.5) and weight decay (regularization parameter of 10−5superscript10510^{-5}). We learn the parameters using the Adagrad algorithm with a learning rate of 0.10.10.1, clipping the gradients which have a norm larger than 1.01.01.0. We initialize the weight of the network in the range [−0.05,0.05]0.050.05[-0.05,0.05], and use a batch size of 202020. Two baselines are considered: we compare our approach to the log-bilinear language model of ?) and the character aware language model of ?). We trained word vectors with character n𝑛n-grams on the training set of the language modeling task and use them to initialize the lookup table of our language model. We report the test perplexity of our model without using pre-trained word vectors (LSTM), with word vectors pre-trained without subword information (sg) and with our vectors (sisg). The results are presented in Table 5.
items.zh: 我们的模型是一个循环神经网络，包含 650650650 个 LSTM 单元，通过 dropout（概率为 0.50.50.5）和权重衰减（正则化参数为 10−510^{-5}）进行正则化。我们使用 Adagrad 算法学习参数，学习率为 0.10.10.1，并对范数大于 1.01.01.0 的梯度进行裁剪。我们将网络权重初始化为 [−0.05,0.05][-0.05,0.05] 范围，并使用批量大小为 202020。考虑了两个基线：我们将我们的方法与 ?) 的对数双线性语言模型和 ?) 的字符感知语言模型进行比较。我们在语言建模任务的训练集上训练了带有字符 n 元语法的词向量，并用它们初始化我们语言模型的查找表。我们报告了模型在不使用预训练词向量（LSTM）、使用无子词信息预训练词向量（sg）以及使用我们的向量（sisg）时的测试困惑度。结果如表 5 所示。

items.en: We observe that initializing the lookup table of the language model with pre-trained word representations improves the test perplexity over the baseline LSTM. The most important observation is that using word representations trained with subword information outperforms the plain skipgram model. We observe that this improvement is most significant for morphologically rich Slavic languages such as Czech (8% reduction of perplexity over sg) and Russian (13% reduction). The improvement is less significant for Roman languages such as Spanish (3% reduction) or French (2% reduction). This shows the importance of subword information on the language modeling task and exhibits the usefulness of the vectors that we propose for morphologically rich languages.
items.zh: 我们观察到，用预训练的词表示初始化语言模型的查找表可以改善测试困惑度，优于基线 LSTM。最重要的观察结果是，使用子词信息训练的词表示优于普通的 skipgram 模型。我们注意到，这种改进对于形态丰富的斯拉夫语言（如捷克语（困惑度比 sg 降低 8%）和俄语（降低 13%））最为显著。对于罗曼语言（如西班牙语（降低 3%）或法语（降低 2%）），改进不太显著。这表明子词信息在语言建模任务中的重要性，并展示了我们提出的向量对于形态丰富语言的实用性。

items.en: We report sample qualitative results in Table 7. For selected words, we show nearest neighbors according to cosine similarity for vectors trained using the proposed approach and for the skipgram baseline. As expected, the nearest neighbors for complex, technical and infrequent words using our approach are better than the ones obtained using the baseline model.
items.zh: 我们在表 7 中报告了示例性定性结果。对于选定的单词，我们展示了使用所提出方法和 skipgram 基线训练的向量在余弦相似度下的最近邻。正如预期，对于复杂、技术性和不常见的单词，使用我们的方法得到的最近邻优于基线模型。

items.en: We want to qualitatively evaluate whether or not the most important n𝑛n-grams in a word correspond to morphemes. To this end, we take a word vector that we construct as the sum of n𝑛n-grams. As described in Sec. 3.2, each word w𝑤w is represented as the sum of its n𝑛n-grams: uw=∑g∈𝒢wzgsubscript𝑢𝑤subscript𝑔subscript𝒢𝑤subscript𝑧𝑔u_{w}=\sum_{g\in\mathcal{G}_{w}}z_{g}. For each n𝑛n-gram g𝑔g, we propose to compute the restricted representation uw\gsubscript𝑢\𝑤𝑔u_{w\backslash g} obtained by omitting g𝑔g:
items.zh: 我们想要定性评估单词中最重要的 n 元语法是否对应于语素。为此，我们取一个词向量，它被构造为 n 元语法的和。如第 3.2 节所述，每个单词 ww 被表示为其 n 元语法的和：uw=∑g∈𝒢wzgu_w = \sum_{g\in\mathcal{G}_w}z_g。对于每个 n 元语法 gg，我们提出通过省略 gg 来计算受限表示 uw\gu_{w\backslash g}：

items.en: We then rank n𝑛n-grams by increasing value of cosine between uwsubscript𝑢𝑤u_{w} and uw\gsubscript𝑢\𝑤𝑔u_{w\backslash g}. We show ranked n𝑛n-grams for selected words in three languages in Table 6.
items.zh: 然后，我们根据 uwu_w 和 uw\gu_{w\backslash g} 之间余弦值的递增顺序对 n 元语法进行排序。我们在表 6 中展示了三种语言中选定单词的排序 n 元语法。

items.en: For German, which has a lot of compound nouns, we observe that the most important n𝑛n-grams correspond to valid morphemes. Good examples include Autofahrer (car driver) whose most important n𝑛n-grams are Auto (car) and Fahrer (driver). We also observe the separation of compound nouns into morphemes in English, with words such as lifetime or starfish. However, for English, we also observe that n𝑛n-grams can correspond to affixes in words such as kindness or unlucky. Interestingly, for French we observe the inflections of verbs with endings such as ais>, ent> or ions>.
items.zh: 对于德语（有很多复合名词），我们观察到最重要的 n 元语法对应于有效的语素。很好的例子包括 Autofahrer（汽车司机），其最重要的 n 元语法是 Auto（汽车）和 Fahrer（司机）。我们还观察到英语中复合名词分离成语素，例如 lifetime 或 starfish。然而，对于英语，我们也观察到 n 元语法可以对应于单词中的词缀，例如 kindness 或 unlucky。有趣的是，对于法语，我们观察到动词的屈折变化，如结尾 ais>、ent> 或 ions>。

items.en: As described in Sec. 3.2, our model is capable of building word vectors for words that do not appear in the training set. For such words, we simply average the vector representation of its n𝑛n-grams. In order to assess the quality of these representations, we analyze which of the n𝑛n-grams match best for OOV words by selecting a few word pairs from the English RW similarity dataset. We select pairs such that one of the two words is not in the training vocabulary and is hence only represented by its n𝑛n-grams. For each pair of words, we display the cosine similarity between each pair of n𝑛n-grams that appear in the words. In order to simulate a setup with a larger number of OOV words, we use models trained on 1%percent11\% of the Wikipedia data as in Sec. 5.4. The results are presented in Fig. 2.
items.zh: 如第 3.2 节所述，我们的模型能够为训练集中未出现的单词构建词向量。对于这样的单词，我们简单地平均其 n 元语法的向量表示。为了评估这些表示的质量，我们通过从英语 RW 相似度数据集中选择几个词对来分析哪些 n 元语法对 OOV 单词匹配最佳。我们选择这样的词对，其中一个单词不在训练词汇表中，因此仅由其 n 元语法表示。对于每个词对，我们显示单词中出现的每对 n 元语法之间的余弦相似度。为了模拟具有更多 OOV 单词的设置，我们使用如第 5.4 节中在 1% 维基百科数据上训练的模型。结果如图 2 所示。

items.en: We observe interesting patterns, showing that subwords match correctly. Indeed, for the word chip, we clearly see that there are two groups of n𝑛n-grams in microcircuit that match well. These roughly correspond to micro and circuit, and n𝑛n-grams in between don’t match well. Another interesting example is the pair rarity and scarceness. Indeed, scarce roughly matches rarity while the suffix -ness matches -ity very well. Finally, the word preadolescent matches young well thanks to the -adolesc- subword. This shows that we build robust word representations where prefixes and suffixes can be ignored if the grammatical form is not found in the dictionary.
items.zh: 我们观察到有趣的模式，表明子词正确匹配。确实，对于单词 chip，我们清楚地看到 microcircuit 中有两组 n 元语法匹配良好。它们大致对应于 micro 和 circuit，而中间的 n 元语法匹配不佳。另一个有趣的例子是词对 rarity 和 scarceness。确实，scarce 大致匹配 rarity，而后缀 -ness 与 -ity 匹配得很好。最后，单词 preadolescent 由于子词 -adolesc- 而与 young 匹配良好。这表明我们构建了鲁棒的词表示，如果语法形式在词典中未找到，前缀和后缀可以被忽略。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Illustration of the similarity between character n𝑛n-grams in out-of-vocabulary words. For each pair, only one word is OOV, and is shown on the x𝑥x axis. Red indicates positive cosine, while blue negative.
items.capZh: 图 2：词汇外单词中字符 n 元语法之间相似度的图示。对于每个词对，只有一个单词是 OOV，并显示在 x 轴上。红色表示正余弦，蓝色表示负。

items.en: In this paper, we investigate a simple method to learn word representations by taking into account subword information. Our approach, which incorporates character n𝑛n-grams into the skipgram model, is related to an idea that was introduced by ?). Because of its simplicity, our model trains fast and does not require any preprocessing or supervision. We show that our model outperforms baselines that do not take into account subword information, as well as methods relying on morphological analysis. We will open source the implementation of our model, in order to facilitate comparison of future work on learning subword representations.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们研究了一种通过考虑子词信息来学习词表示的简单方法。我们的方法将字符 n 元语法纳入 skipgram 模型，这与 ?) 引入的想法相关。由于其简单性，我们的模型训练速度快，且不需要任何预处理或监督。我们表明，我们的模型优于不考虑子词信息的基线以及依赖形态分析的方法。我们将开源我们模型的实现，以便于未来关于学习子词表示的工作进行比较。

items.en: We thank Marco Baroni, Hinrich Schütze and the anonymous reviewers for their insightful comments.
items.zh: 我们感谢 Marco Baroni、Hinrich Schütze 和匿名审稿人的深刻评论。
